refMeta.title: Tailwind CSS Cards - Official Tailwind UI Components
refMeta.bodyText:
Introducing Oatmeal
Our new multi-theme marketing site kit

Templates
UI Kit
Sign in
Get full access
UI Blocks
Application UI
Layout
Cards

Use these Tailwind CSS card components to break your dashboards, profile pages, or admin interfaces up into smaller cards and wells for things like charts, tables, or forms. These components are designed and built by the Tailwind CSS team, and include a variety of different styles and layouts.

PLUS / UI BLOCKS / APPLICATION UI / LAYOUT / CARDS

Cards

관련 정보와 행동을 작은 표면 하나에 묶어 목록, 대시보드, 설정 화면에서 반복 배치하는 레이아웃 패턴입니다.

Tailwind Plus처럼 각 leaf의 첫 예제는 Preview와 Code를 함께 제공하고, 이후 예제는 Preview와 잠금 code CTA로 구분합니다. 우리 예시는 실제 화면 맥락에 맞춘 설명, tags, interaction feedback을 함께 보여줍니다.

ON THIS PAGE

10 examples

Card, edge-to-edge on mobile

Card with footer
